Introduction: Hi! Hi! Do you understand me? I’m Joltik! I have lots of brothers and sisters! Can I hitch a ride? You look like fun! Fun! Fun!$1#$e#Mama doesn't have to know I tagged along with you!
DumpsterDiveComment: Don't touch me! Emmet won't be happy if I track dirt on him!$3
GreenRain: The TV isn't working...2#$e#I didn't do it this time! Trust me!!! Emmet taught me that it is verrrry bad to lie!$3
GreenRainFinished: Wowowowow!!! The plants grew so big! Let's play with all the new hiding places! You seek first!$5
GreenRain_2: The green rain is verrrry funny! Miss Garbodor was happy about it!$1#$b#But I can't play with her. Even if there's big plants to climb. Emmet told me to stay inside. He doesn't want me staining him green.$2
jojaMartStruckByLightning: The JojaMart was extra yummy today! Fresh lightning tastes the best.$1#$e#The funny forest spirits disappeared. That makes me sad. I miss them. There aren't many friends our size here.$2#$e#Miss Chandelure misses the forest spirits, too. She won't admit it though.$7
AdoptableJoltikEvent1: Did you see Emmet today? I did. With my compound eyes.
AdoptableJoltikEvent2: Emmet has been trying to play hide 'n' seek with you. I think it's funny.#$e#Do you think he can win against me? I don't think he can. I like winning more than anything!$1#$e#Emmet doesn't like losing things. Which is good. Because I like being found! He's always tracking the things he cares about down. It's fun!$5#$b#He tracked you down, too! That means he cares about you. Too! It makes me happy that we're all friends together!$1
AdoptableJoltikEvent3: Emmet isn't good at hide 'n' seek, but it's okay! I don't think you're good at finding him.$1#$e#Huh? You saw him?$3#$b#Bad! No! Don't do that! Don't go easy on him! If a battle is not serious, it's not fun! He'll get mad! I think!$6
AdoptableJoltikEvent4: Emmet told me to not tell you that he's been feeding me extra batteries. But he also told me that the truth is verrrrry important. It's not right to lie!$7#$e#I have to listen to Mama most of all. She said she would help him. But she also said she doesn't care either way.$6#$b#That's too com-compu-complic-hard. Hard to understand. I don't know what to do about that.$2#$e#What do you think I should do, @? Should I tell you that Emmet and Mama are having secret meetings with me without you?$7#$e#Wait!!! You are @! Ahhhh!!! I didn't say that! Wait- no! The truth is verrrrry important! Um! Uh! Pretend I didn't! okay? Playing is okay. So play pretend!$3
AdoptableJoltikEvent5: Emmet is always busy! Mister Ingo is, too. But Emmet is more ef-eff-effish-elefish-no-effishy-efficien-he's better at conducting himself.$4#$b#He can wake up early! He finishes his work so he can make time for me! And my siblings! That makes me smile. Which is important. Emmet wants to make everyone smile.$1#$e#Ingo gets a little cranky sometimes. But it's okay. Emmet says it's verrrry hard work attending to other passengers.$6#$b#Not all of them are nice. Not all of them follow the rules. So I have to understand him. I don't want Emmet to be cranky, too. So I have to follow the rules.$2#$e#Mister Ingo calls me a little passenger. But I don't think he counts me as work. He nags Emmet a lot for getting sidetracked with me.$7#$b#But that's okay, too. I don't want to be seen as work to Mister Ingo. It gives him the stressies.$3#$b#Emmet cares verrrry much about his work. That includes me. So that means I'm important. Yay! That also means he gets sad when he can't keep himself busy attending to me.$5
AdoptableJoltikEvent6: Mama and Emmet still miss me. But they're getting used to it. It takes them a while to ad-adj-ah-adjust.#$b#But I like the new routine we're making! They do, too! Even if they miss me.$1$e#Emmet misses you a lot, too. But I think I made him split tracks with you for a little bit. His train of thought got derailed by me. I'm sorry!$2
AdoptableJoltikEvent7: Ahhhhh! I forgot to hug Emmet bye-bye!!! Before he left!$3#$b#I don't think he'll be mad though. Because he had you. I think he's back on track now. Yup!$1#$e#Let's all cuddle together next time! Static tastes the best when it's made with love. Mama is really good at making it!
Mon: Hi. Do you have food?#$b#No? Aw.$2
Mon2: All the grown-up Pokémon are super busy today.... Even Mama. I can’t play with Mister Eelektross. Or hide on Miss Garbodor.$2#$b#Being a grown-up is no fun. Will you play with me, @? Or do you have to do grown-up Human things?
Mon4: I almost got stepped on. It's really hard being small.$7
Mon6: There aren't many devices here...$7#$e#Thank you for feeding me! It means a lot!$5
Mon8: Thank you for everything!$1#$e#Emmet taught me to always board the gratitude express with my favorite conductor. Mister Ingo taught him to do that with his passengers!
Mon10: I really want another battery.$7#$b#But I don't want to seem too greedy! Pretend you didn't hear that! I don't want to lose your trust! Emmet taught me that it's verrrry important!
Tue: I’m small. Careful. Don’t step on me!$3
Tue2: People say spiders are scary. People say I'm a spider. That makes me sad.$7
Tue4: Sometimes being small is bad. I’m so tiny. It’s hard to see me. But sometimes being small is good! I can hide anywhere!#$e#Let’s play hide n' seek! I will win!$1
Tue6: Mama met papa at a train depot! It was really fun living there!#$e#Papa doesn't like Mr. Reuniclus. He doesn't like his experiments. He says he tried to steal me away as an egg. But I think helping him is fun!$3
Tue8: Miss Maru's a really good cook! She's always making really yummy devices!$5
Tue10: The food you give me always tastes the best! Maybe it's because I like being fed by you.$5
Wed: What's that? Can I eat it?$1
Wed4: There aren't any battles here in the valley... I'll never evolve!
Wed6: When I grow up, I’m going to battle just like Mama! She’s super strong!#$e#But I don’t want to evolve.... It seems scary. If I evolve I would be too big to fit inside my favorite pocket!$3#$e#I like Emmet’s coat pocket... it’s cozy!$1
Wed8: Emmet says being timid makes you verrrrrrry fast! I don't get it!
Wed10: We should race! I've been training my speed! Full steam ahead!
Thu: I have lots of brothers and sisters! Mama doesn’t like it when we don’t stick together.
Thu2: @? How come you can understand me? And Mama? And the other grown-up Pokémon?#$b#Every time I try to talk to Emmet, he doesn’t understand me. It’s sad. If we could talk! I could tell him to give me all the tasty snacks!$2
Thu4: I like batteries! Just so you know! You should feed me some!
Thu6: The other spiders aren't yellow and fluffy. Why?
Thu8: Mister Elliott doesn't have many devices, but he's really nice. I'm friends with the other spiders in his house! He takes really good care of them!
Thu10: I'm so full of battery. Yum.$5
Fri: Bah... Battery...$5#$e#Sorry! You don't have to feed me!$3
Fri2: Some people go out of their way to step on bugs on purpose. It's really mean!$3
Fri4: I really want to eat Mister Sebastian's computers.#$e#I'm not going to. I'm kind of scared of him.$7
Fri6: Mister Ingo doesn't like me very much. But it's okay. Emmet protects me! Mister Ingo likes Emmet enough to be okay with me.
Fri8: Mr. Gus takes good care of the arcade machines!$1#$e#He says it's okay if I'm hungry. I feel bad being fed by him though.
Fri10: Fiber optic cables... yum yum yum in my tum tum tum.$5
Sat: Hehe! Don’t tell another Pokémon. But Emmet gave us- in his words- a 'verrrrry' important task!$1#$b#We get to play hide 'n seek in the Joja Mart! No one found us yet! It’s fun! Fun! Fun!$1
Sat2: My brothers and sisters say that Joja Mart has a lot of tasty wires! I would join them but... the Mandibuzz Human is super scary. I don’t want to get caught!
Sat4: Apparently I was born with Cross Poison. I don't know what I'm supposed to do with it though.
Sat6: I don't really understand EVs and IVs. But Emmet says I have potential. That makes me happy.$5
Sat8: Emmet told me everyone can smile! Even if their mouth makes it hard to see. A smile is a smile!$5#$e#I hope you can see my smile... I think it's hard to tell if you don't have mandibles.$7
Sat10: If you have any static, you can count on me!$1
Sun: All my brothers and sisters have names! Emmet gave them to us! With Mama’s okay!$1#$b#But I don’t have a name. Every time Emmet tries to give me one... Mama says 'No.’
Sun2: I like playing with Miss Jas and Mister Vincent! They’re super fun! And they’re not scared of me either!$1#$b#But... I feel bad... I’m afraid of Vincent. Maybe it’s because I'm small. I think he'll squish me.$3
Sun4: I saw Mister Vincent squish some bugs earlier... Scary...$2
Sun6: Miss Jas taught Mister Vincent to be nice to bugs. That makes me happy.#$e#I'm still a little scared of him.
Sun8: Miss Jas is really good with animals! She's nice to bugs, too. I'm safe with her. I trust Mister Vincent now, too!
Sun10: I'm really happy I can trust you!$1#$e#It would be scary if I couldn't.$3
